content:
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_lyr01dU7pj1qzwi7fo1_1280.png)

If the browser can't complete the download, don't delete the file just yet. **wget** can complete the job.

Usage: `wget --continue <url>`

Note: **wget** doesn't come preinstalled on Mac OS X but if you're using Leopard (10.5), Snow Leopard (10.6) or Lion (10.7) on Intel Macs, you can install [Homebrew](http://mxcl.github.com/homebrew/) package management. You can then install many more UNIX-based CLI.
